s1_notes: REAL DATA: 8,100/mo, £7.70 CPC. STRONGEST LOCAL SIGNAL OF SESSION - both horshamsurveyors.co.uk and sussexsurveyors.com rank on the bare head term. Only RICS as brand, no wall. | volume triangulated: KS 8,100 + UB 6.6K, both UK, 2026-07-14; robust to £800 gate at 6,600. volume_confidence LOW (triangulated, not KP-verified)
build_target_reason: rule matched: website/lead-gen → claude-code; lead-gen sites need Next.js page control and form-backend wiring; Lovable's template-first pace cannot provide this and Replit is prototype-grade.
